creator: jake@checker.org
text:
diff -urN /usr/ports/java/tya/Makefile tya/Makefile
--- /usr/ports/java/tya/Makefile	Mon Sep  6 21:11:22 1999
+++ tya/Makefile	Tue Sep  7 01:01:37 1999
@@ -1,13 +1,13 @@
 # New ports collection makefile for:	tya
-# Version required:	1.4
+# Version required:	1.4v2
 # Date created:		16 May 1999
 # Whom:			jake@checker.org
 #
 # $FreeBSD: ports/java/tya/Makefile,v 1.8 1999/09/06 14:33:26 taoka Exp $
 #
 
-DISTNAME=	tya14
-PKGNAME=	tya-1.4
+DISTNAME=	tya14v2
+PKGNAME=	tya-1.4v2
 CATEGORIES=	java
 MASTER_SITES=	ftp://gonzalez.cyberus.ca/pub/Linux/java/
 EXTRACT_SUFX=	.tgz
@@ -16,7 +16,7 @@
 
 BUILD_DEPENDS=	${LOCALBASE}/${JAVADIR}/bin/java:${PORTSDIR}/java/jdk
 
-WRKSRC=		${WRKDIR}/tya1.4
+WRKSRC=		${WRKDIR}/tya1.4v2
 
 ONLY_FOR_ARCHS=	i386
 
diff -urN /usr/ports/java/tya/files/md5 tya/files/md5
--- /usr/ports/java/tya/files/md5	Mon Sep  6 21:11:22 1999
+++ tya/files/md5	Tue Sep  7 01:01:56 1999
@@ -1 +1 @@
-MD5 (tya14.tgz) = 7ba59c373e66be480f021d4133ae0ff4
+MD5 (tya14v2.tgz) = 7a398a7509bb1d8e7624fe69232dd17d

Fix: 

n/a
How-To-Repeat: 
	n/a
